steps.name: Click on 'System administration' menu in Header
Verify: 'Add business unit' button is disabled before selecting a company
Verify: 'Add business unit' dialog is opened
Verify: Company name is pre-filled correctly
Click on the 'Create' button and trigger an error
Verify: Validation error is shown when merchant name is not filled
Verify: Success alert is shown after business unit is added
